name: HYDRASCAN PRO
shortDescription: 8+1 function hydrofacial with AI skin analysis. Real-time diagnostics, digital treatment diary, before-and-after documentation.
description:
The HYDRASCAN PRO is not just a multifunctional hydrofacial device, but an intelligent skin diagnostic and treatment system as well.

The device's specialty is combining traditional facial treatment technologies with artificial intelligence, making treatments not only more effective but also more personalized.

The built-in AI skin analysis system provides real-time diagnostics: pore size, wrinkle depth, pigmentation, hydration, sebum production, elasticity, inflamed areas, and UV damage – all automatically analyzed with treatment recommendations.

Before-and-after photos and charts can be created of the client's condition, and the system maintains a treatment diary so every change is documented.
metaTitle: HydraSCAN Pro | AI Skin Analysis Integrated 8+1 Function Hydrofacial
metaDescription: AI-supported hydrofacial device: real-time skin diagnostics, 8+1 treatment functions, digital treatment diary. 599,990 Ft, 2-year warranty.

review.name: Farkas Renáta
review.text: AI is really trending now and as a beginning esthetician, <mark>I wanted to stand out from the crowd! With this device I succeeded</mark>, clients really like that there's smart technology built in. The training materials are very detailed, I've never received anything like this before – though I don't have much experience yet, this has been a very positive experience.

features.title: Skin analysis powered by artificial intelligence
features.description:
The HYDRASCAN PRO's built-in AI skin analysis system provides real-time diagnostics for targeted and precise treatments.

The AI system examines:

pore size
wrinkle depth
pigmentation and spots
skin hydration level
sebum production
elasticity, tone
acne or inflamed areas
UV damage traces

features.title: Personalized treatment protocols
features.description: Based on the results, the device automatically recommends treatment directions. Before-and-after photos and charts can be created of the client's condition, and the system maintains a treatment diary so every change is documented. The client receives a treatment tailored to their skin, not a template treatment.

features.title: Convincing client communication with data and images
features.description: Thanks to the AI system, it's transparent to the client why they're receiving a specific treatment – this builds trust. The progress curve can be documented with charts, images, and data, so the visible results speak for themselves.

features.title: Digital treatment diary and before-and-after documentation
features.description: The system automatically creates before-and-after photos, charts, and maintains an online client card for every client. Treatment protocols are saved, so the reviewable treatment history encourages the client to return.

training.headline: Operator training – official adult education program
training.intro: A professional operator training course is available for the HYDRASCAN PRO device, provided within the framework of officially registered adult education. The goal of the training is for participants to acquire comprehensive theoretical and practical knowledge for the professional and safe use of the device.
items: HYDRASCAN PRO operating principles, technologies, and treatment heads
Intelligent skin analysis system interpretation and practical application
Treatment protocols for different skin types and concerns
Client communication and treatment diary management
closingParagraphs: You are welcome to bring a model to the training so you can learn the treatment techniques in a real-world, supervised educational environment.
Upon completion of the training, we issue an official certificate confirming your competence in the professional operation of the HYDRASCAN PRO device.
This knowledge is not only a tremendous help in your daily work but also enables you to provide your services to clients at an even more confident, professional level.
If you're interested in the training opportunity, please contact us through any of our channels to arrange an appointment!

testimonials.name: Kozma Orsi
testimonials.text: I really love this device! I was worried about the training part because, okay, 7 years ago when I did esthetics school I used the basic devices, but nowadays I've taken treatments in a completely different direction... so I needed a refresher, but <mark>I got everything I could need</mark>. Afterwards I also needed a bit of help with the AI part and product setup, but they were very kind and helped immediately, so my first real treatment went really well too! Thank you!

expertQuote.quote: HydraFacial is one of the best ROI investments for a salon. Clients immediately see results and regularly return – that means guaranteed revenue.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

faq.question: What exactly does the AI skin analysis system analyze?
faq.answer: The HydraSCAN Pro's built-in AI system examines in real-time: pore size, wrinkle depth, pigmentation and spots, skin hydration level, sebum production, elasticity and tone, acne or inflamed areas, and UV damage traces. Based on results, it automatically recommends treatment directions.

faq.question: What advantage does AI diagnosis have over traditional skin analysis?
faq.answer: AI is objective, reproducible, and much more detailed than visual examination. It maps skin properties that cannot be detected with the naked eye. It also maintains a digital treatment diary, creates before-and-after images, so treatment effects are measurably documented.

faq.question: Can the device maintain client cards and treatment history?
faq.answer: Yes! The HydraSCAN Pro maintains a digital treatment diary for every client. Before-and-after images, charts, and analysis results are saved, so every change can be tracked and shown to the client.

faq.question: What training comes with the HydraSCAN Pro?
faq.answer: A 69,990 Ft official adult education operator training course is available. The training covers all functions, AI system interpretation, treatment protocols, and practical treatments. We issue an official certificate.

faq.question: How quickly does the HydraSCAN Pro pay for itself?
faq.answer: On average within 2-4 months, with 3-5 clients per day. A hydrofacial treatment is priced between 15,000-30,000 Ft, while AI-enhanced premium treatments can be offered at 35,000-50,000 Ft. Use our on-page ROI calculator for exact figures!

faq.question: What skin types is the treatment suitable for?
faq.answer: The HydraSCAN Pro is suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin. The AI analysis precisely assesses the skin's condition and recommends a personalized treatment protocol, so you always work at the appropriate intensity for the client's skin.

faq.question: What consumables are needed for the device?
faq.answer: Special serums and solutions are needed for hydrodermabrasion treatments (cleansing, hydrating, antioxidant). We provide these to our clients at discounted prices. The AI skin analysis function doesn't require consumables.

faq.question: Can I view the device before purchasing?
faq.answer: Yes! You can view and try the HydraSCAN Pro in person at our showroom (Érd, Budai út 28.) by appointment. You can even try the AI analysis on your own skin!
